channel.description: Latest marine jobs for Tanker Fleet
channel.title: Maritime Union - Job for Mariners

item.description:
Location:
Description:

An initiative application is welcomed for roles within the tanker fleet. This is an opportunity to join an international team focused on teamwork and employee development. The company offers a supportive environment with potential career progression pathways.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Initiative Application - Tanker Fleet at German Tanker Shipping GmbH & Company KG

item.description:
Location: worldwide
Description:

A Chief Mate (First Officer) is sought to join a fleet operating on worldwide trade routes. The role requires valid STCW 95 certificates, including advanced training for oil and chemical tankers. Strong leadership, safety awareness, and fluent English are essential. Experience on oil/chemical tankers is advantageous. This position offers a permanent contract and career growth opportunities.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Chief Mate Job on Oil and Chemical Tanker at German Tanker Shipping GmbH & Company KG

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A Nautical Officer (OOW) role is open on a tanker vessel. Join an international environment that prioritizes teamwork and employee development. This position offers a supportive atmosphere where individual contributions are valued, with potential pathways for career progression ashore.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Nautical Officer (OOW) Vacancy - Tanker at German Tanker Shipping GmbH & Company KG

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A QSSM/HSE position is available within the tanker shipping sector. This role is part of an international team that values collaboration and employee growth. The company provides a supportive environment with opportunities for career advancement, including potential shore-based roles.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] QSSM/HSE Role - Tanker Shipping at German Tanker Shipping GmbH & Company KG

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Qualified crew members are sought for Crude Oil Tanker VLCC operations. This role requires adherence to high safety and professional standards within the tanker business. The company offers fair treatment, timely payment according to international maritime tariffs, and a structured training program for cadets. Interested individuals are encouraged to submit their applications.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Crude Oil Tanker VLCC Crew Vacancy at DS Crewing GmbH

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Experienced Master, Second Officer, Chief Engineer, Second Engineer, and Third Engineer are sought for oil and chemical tanker vessels. Previous experience on similar tankers and a valid Turkish Seaman's Book are required. Joining is urgent in July. Positions are available on 40,000-80,000 DWT vessels.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Master, Officer, Engineer Jobs on Tanker Vessels at Pera Shipping

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Experienced Master, Second Officer, Chief Engineer, Second Engineer, and Third Engineer are sought for Oil and Chemical Tankers ranging from 40,000 to 80,000 DWT. Candidates must have relevant tanker experience and a valid Turkish Seaman's Book. Immediate joining is required in July.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Officers Needed for Oil Chemical Tankers at Pera Shipping

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Hiring is open for experienced tanker professionals. Seeking applications for the positions of Master, Chief Officer, Chief Engineer, and Second Engineer. Candidates with prior tanker experience are specifically encouraged to apply for these onboard roles.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Master, Chief Officer, Chief Engineer, 2nd Engineer - Tanker at aethertanker.com

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A Gas Tanker Master and Officers (Chief Officer, Chief Engineer, Second Engineer) are sought for an upcoming contract. Candidates with solid offshore experience are encouraged to apply. This is an opportunity to join a high-performing team on a gas tanker.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Master Officer Vacancy on Gas Tanker at Lowland International

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Experienced deck and engine officers with previous LNG experience are sought for positions on a growing LNG fleet. Candidates should possess valid certification and a strong commitment to safety and operational excellence. This role offers competitive employment opportunities, professional development, and career progression within a safety-focused LNG operation.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] LNG Officer Vacancies - LNG Carrier Fleet at Zorovic Maritime Services
